description_long: This is a rectangular wooden toolbox with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring a hinged lid that opens to reveal a set of hand tools. The box is constructed from rough, unfinished wood planks, with visible grain and knots, and reinforced at the corners. Inside, the toolbox is divided into two main compartments: one side holds a large hand saw with a wooden handle, while the other contains several wooden-handled tools such as planes and possibly a chisel. Metal handles are mounted on the short ends of the box for carrying, and the box shows signs of age and use, including scratches and patina. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements, and the compartments appear fixed and tailored to fit the tools snugly.
description: A weathered wooden toolbox with metal side handles, divided into two compartments containing a hand saw and several wooden-handled tools. The box has a rustic, utilitarian look with visible wood grain and signs of use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open toolbox with a large hand saw and several wooden-handled tools neatly arranged in two compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the compartments and the metal handle on the end, with tools partially visible inside.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full width of the toolbox, the arrangement of tools inside, and the weathered wooden exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open lid, the internal compartments, and the metal handle on the near end.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed rectangular metal handles mounted on each short end of the box, made of steel or iron, with a simple utilitarian design and no ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism on the exterior; the lid appears to rest closed without a clasp.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Two main fixed internal compartments: one wide compartment for a hand saw and one narrower compartment holding several wooden-handled tools. No removable trays or drawers are visible.
